mapper.select: SELECT id, name, slug, creator_id, usage_count, created_at, updated_at FROM tags ORDER BY usage_count DESC, name ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, name, slug, creator_id, usage_count, created_at, updated_at FROM tags WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, slug, creator_id, usage_count, created_at, updated_at FROM tags WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tags (name, slug, creator_id, usage_count) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{creatorId}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE tags SET usage_count = usage_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE name = #{name}
